title: clerodendrum alatum var. floribundum
intro: Clerodendrum alatum var. floribundum, also known as the 'Himalayan Glory Bower' or 'Fragrant Glory Bower', is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Lamiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Clerodendrum alatum var. floribundum include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, headache, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
